warning: Candidate and reference datasets are not model-development data and must not be added to the current training or validation total.

records.name: Herlev Pap Smear Dataset
records.current_use: Four-class grade development, held-out evaluation, and five-fold cross-validation

records.name: SIPaKMeD
records.modality: Conventional Pap, cropped cells from 966 source clusters
records.current_use: Independent KOIL model development and source-cluster-disjoint locked testing

records.name: CCCID v2
records.current_use: Positive-only external KOIL challenge and public morphology reference

records.name: CRIC Cervix Classification
records.current_use: Twenty visual references each for NILM, LSIL, HSIL, and SCC; not model evaluation

records.name: Liquid-based cytology multi-class dataset
records.current_use: Candidate for licensing, patient-split, label, and domain review; not downloaded into current evidence

records.name: Pap-smear cervical cytology image dataset
records.current_use: Candidate for provenance, patient-level split, quality, and label review

records.name: HiCervix
records.current_use: Restricted-access candidate; institutional access and governance required

records.name: APCEM-Enhanced Cervical Cytology
records.modality: Enhanced Pap images, six Bethesda categories
records.current_use: Candidate only; original-image provenance and enhancement effects require review

records.name: Cx22
records.modality: Overlapping cervical-cell fields with instance labels
records.current_use: Candidate for future segmentation research; not a current classification endpoint

records.name: CCAgT
records.modality: AgNOR-stained cervical cells with detection annotations
records.current_use: Out-of-scope staining domain; catalogued for future detection research only
